goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 20:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'graffiti'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '12:45' on 'the same day'.
If the booking fails how about '11:45'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should arrive by 20:45
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called graffiti
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 12:45 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 11:45
Make sure you get the reference number
